sentences.target: La boutique ouvre à dix heures.

translations.fr: La boutique ouvre à dix heures.
translations.es: La tienda abre a las diez.
translations.vi: Cửa hàng mở cửa lúc mười giờ.
translations.nl: De winkel gaat om tien uur open.
translations.ro: Magazinul se deschide la ora zece.

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of the noun 'boutique' (subject).
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicates the action of the subject.
Preposition introducing a time complement.
Cardinal numeral modifying 'heures' in the time expression.
Plural common noun; object of the preposition 'à' forming the time phrase.

sentences.target: Je passe à la boutique après le travail.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pas a la bu.tik apʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/

translations.fr: Je passe à la boutique après le travail.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pas a la bu.tik apʁɛ lə tʁa.vaj/
translations.en: I'm stopping by the shop after work.
translations.es: Paso por la tienda después del trabajo.
translations.de: Ich schaue nach der Arbeit im Laden vorbei.
translations.it: Passo al negozio dopo il lavoro.
translations.yue: 我放工後會去舖頭一趟。
translations.ru: Я зайду в магазин после работы.
translations.pt: Vou passar na loja depois do trabalho.
translations.vi: Sau giờ làm tôi sẽ ghé cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Ik loop na het werk even langs de winkel.
translations.uk: Я зайду до магазину після роботи.
translations.hi: काम के बाद मैं दुकान पर होकर जाऊँगा।
translations.el: Θα περάσω από το μαγαζί μετά τη δουλειά.
translations.nb: Jeg stikker innom butikken etter jobb.
translations.id: Saya akan mampir ke toko setelah kerja.
translations.sv: Jag svänger förbi butiken efter jobbet.
translations.ro: Trec pe la magazin după serviciu.
translations.cs: Po práci se stavím v obchodě.
translations.da: Jeg kigger forbi butikken efter arbejde.
translations.ja: 仕事のあとで店に寄ります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'passe'.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; denotes the action.
Preposition indicating destination/goal.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'boutique'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'à'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'travail'.
Common noun, masculine; object of 'après'.

sentences.target: Tu connais une boutique de vélos pas loin.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔ.nɛ yn bu.tik də ve.lo pa lwɛ̃/

translations.fr: Tu connais une boutique de vélos pas loin.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔ.nɛ yn bu.tik də ve.lo pa lwɛ̃/
translations.en: You know a bike shop nearby.
translations.es: Conoces una tienda de bicicletas cerca.
translations.de: Du kennst einen Fahrradladen in der Nähe.
translations.it: Conosci un negozio di biciclette qui vicino.
translations.ko: 너는 근처에 자전거 가게를 알고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道附近有一家自行车店。
translations.pt: Você conhece uma loja de bicicletas por perto.
translations.vi: Bạn biết một cửa hàng xe đạp ở gần.
translations.nl: Je kent een fietsenwinkel in de buurt.
translations.hi: तुम पास में एक साइकिल की दुकान जानते हो।
translations.el: Ξέρεις ένα κατάστημα ποδηλάτων εδώ κοντά.
translations.nb: Du kjenner en sykkelbutikk i nærheten.
translations.id: Kamu tahu toko sepeda di dekat sini.
translations.sv: Du känner till en cykelbutik i närheten.
translations.ro: Tu cunoști un magazin de biciclete în apropiere.
translations.cs: Znáš v okolí obchod s koly.
translations.da: Du kender en cykelbutik i nærheden.
translations.ja: あなたは近くの自転車店を知っている。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'connais'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive verb taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'boutique'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'connais'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying type ('vélos').
Common noun, plural; complement of 'de' (forming 'boutique de vélos').
Adverb of negation; modifies 'loin' (colloquial omission of 'ne').
Adverb; with 'pas' forms the adverbial phrase 'pas loin' indicating proximity.

sentences.target: Ils tiennent une petite boutique de quartier.
sentences.reading: /il tjɛn yn pə.tit bu.tik də kaʁ.tje/

translations.fr: Ils tiennent une petite boutique de quartier.
translations.ipa: /il tjɛn yn pə.tit bu.tik də kaʁ.tje/
translations.en: They run a small neighborhood shop.
translations.es: Llevan una pequeña tienda de barrio.
translations.it: Gestiscono un piccolo negozio di quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们经营一家社区小店。
translations.yue: 佢哋經營一間細細嘅街坊舖。
translations.ru: Они держат небольшой магазинчик в районе.
translations.pt: Eles administram uma pequena loja de bairro.
translations.vi: Họ điều hành một cửa hàng nhỏ trong khu phố.
translations.ar: إنهم يديرون متجرًا صغيرًا في الحي.
translations.uk: Вони тримають невелику крамницю у своєму районі.
translations.hi: वे मोहल्ले में एक छोटी दुकान चलाते हैं।
translations.id: Mereka menjalankan sebuah toko kecil di lingkungan.
translations.ro: Ei conduc un mic magazin de cartier.
translations.ja: 彼らは地域の小さな店を経営している。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'tiennent'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive ('to run/operate' a shop).
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner of 'boutique'.
Adjective, feminine singular; prenominal modifier describing size of 'boutique'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'tiennent'.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying type ('quartier').
Common noun; complement of 'de' forming 'boutique de quartier' (neighborhood shop).
